title: PHATOIL Vanilla Essential Oil 100ml - 100% Pure and Natural Premium Grade Vanilla Oil for Home Aromatherapy, Diffusers, Skin Care, Soap and Candle Making
features: Wonderful Scent: Vanilla essential oils are highly concentrated liquids derived from the vanilla fruits, providing a warm, sweet, and comforting aroma. The scents are rich and long-lasting, enhancing your space with a cozy and inviting atmosphere

Essential Oils for Diffusers for Home: The warm, comforting scent of Vanilla oil enhances the ambiance of your home. Its sweet and inviting aroma lingers gently, creating an welcoming atmosphere of relaxation, perfect for unwinding after a long day

DIY Usages: Beyond its popular use in aromatherapy diffusers, Vanilla oil offers endless possibilities for DIY projects. It can be incorporated into various handmade creations such as soaps, candles, bath bombs, body lotions, sprays, and more

Essential Oils for Candle Making: Add depth and warmth to your homemade candles with our vanilla essential oil. Its versatile scent blends seamlessly with various fragrances, ensuring that each candle you craft is a delightful sensory experience

Essential Oils for Soap Making: Vanilla oil adds a soothing and inviting fragrance to handmade soaps, enhancing their appeal and charm. Its complex and enduring scent profile leaves a lasting impression, making each soap a fragrant masterpiece

Thoughtful Design: Each Vanilla oil essential oil is bottled in 100 ml (3.38 fl.oz) amber glass bottle to help keep the fragrance lasting. It also comes with a premium quality glass dropper to help you get the exact amount you desire every time

Ideal Gifts: With elegant packaging, PHATOIL Vanilla oils are ideal as gifts for birthdays, Christmas, or any special occasion. Give the gift of relaxation and wellness—cherished and appreciated by loved ones on any holiday or celebratory moment

Blends Well with Other Scents: Vanilla essential oil is versatile and blends well with various scents, such as lavender, sandalwood, cinnamon and lemon. Just 2 drops of each is enough to make a customized blend that’s right for you
